mapper.select: SELECT id, title, author, view_count, reg_date, update_date FROM board WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE del_yn = 'N'
SELECT id, title, content, author, view_count, reg_date, update_date FROM board WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, author, password) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{author}, #{password})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, password = #{password}, author = #{author}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
